error_signature: workflow stops when Remove Duplicates outputs nothing
title: Workflow halts on empty output from Remove Duplicates
symptom: The workflow stops executing when the Remove Duplicates node processes a feed with no new items, causing no further actions to occur.
not_this_if: Remove Duplicates node outputs data without empty entries
root_cause: When the Remove Duplicates node encounters a feed with no new items, it does not output any data, causing the workflow to halt. This is problematic in a loop where subsequent feeds need to be processed.
fix_steps: Add a Filter node after the Remove Duplicates node and set it to always output data.
Configure the Filter node to check if the JSON object is not empty.
Insert an If node after the Filter node to check if the output is empty.
Connect the If node to the next steps in the workflow accordingly.
agent_instruction: Use a Filter node to ensure the workflow continues even when the Remove Duplicates node outputs nothing.
